//: Project-scoped MCP servers for Wayfinder. Context7 is active (works on a fresh clone). The Unity + Blender servers are documented in .claude/README.md and added only after Unity/Blender are installed locally (Phase 0+), because they need a local editor/app running. Do NOT add a second Unity bridge or the paid asset-generator servers here.
//github: GitHub MCP needs `gh auth login` (or a PAT) done once, manually, outside this config. Uses the official remote server, no local process.
//gis: gis-mcp needs Python 3.10+/uv on this machine (same prereq as the Unity bridge). Beta (mahdin75), complements raw GDAL for dem-to-terrain; GDAL recipe stays source of truth.
//unity: Unity OFFICIAL MCP (com.unity.ai.assistant 2.15+, user's pick — replaces the Coplay default from .claude/README.md; one-bridge rule stands). Dormant until Unity 6 + the AI Assistant package are installed: the Editor installs the relay binary to %USERPROFILE%/.unity/relay/ on load, then Project Settings > AI > Unity MCP Server must show the bridge Running. VERIFY the exact Windows relay exe name against that panel's Example Configuration at install time — filename below is the expected pattern, not confirmed.
